a.xlink:title: Attempt to parse an incoming bit stream into an AX.25 frame.
Convert a bit stream from NRZI to standard encoding.
Attempt to parse a single AX.25 frame from an already NRZI-decoded bit stream. Unlike parseBitStream,...
Returns the next bit of the bit stream that will be encoded.
After adding all of the data to the bit stream, this method will write the data left in the buffer.
Finds the start flags in the bit stream and removes them.
Checks if the address is valid, if not throws an exception with a specific error code.
Returns the next bit of the bit stream without removing it.
